title: gypsophila fastigiata subsp. fastigiata
intro: Gypsophila fastigiata subsp. fastigiata, also known as upright gypsophila, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Caryophyllaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including inflammation, fever, and digestive issues. The plant's leaves and roots are rich in flavonoids, phenolic acids, and other bioactive compounds that contribute to its medicinal and health benefits, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote overall well-being.
